reviewer: human approver (project owner) — genuine session decision, 2026-07-22, relayed by the orchestrator from a real user approval this session
rationale: ADM-012 (issue #142) is code-complete and committed (81974a9, stacks on ADM-011 0bf8365), independently EVL-confirmed green (packages/api 716/716, apps/admin 181/181, 3 typechecks clean, admin build clean, format:check clean; see verification.json). AC12 -- the sole remaining owed gate, a real-browser walkthrough covering both a staff-role and an admin-role invite, the password strength meter, and the confirm-mismatch error -- was performed and PASSED by the user this session, closing the last item in the plan's own Verification Evidence table (13/13 ACs now met). This adversarial pass (adversarial-validation.json) examined the ADM-012-specific surface not covered by ADM-011's own harness pack -- the new session-gated set-password route, the profile-step updateUser call, and the role-based post-setup routing branch -- and found no unresolved trust-boundary defect: the set-password route cannot target another account (session-scoped, no target-id input, framework-enforced), role remains structurally excluded from every client-writable call (input:false, mirrored client-side and server-side), and the routing branch's only real security boundary (the (dashboard) route's own requireAdmin-backed guard) is independent of and unaffected by this plan's UI-level routing logic. Two scenarios were marked not-fully-ruled-out rather than clean-ruled-out (devtools-forced client routing bypassed by the independent dashboard guard; the general browser-link-vs-deep-link exposure class inherent to any emailed accept URL) -- both are pre-existing architectural properties of this codebase (documented in adm-route-guard-ssr's all-context.md entry) or standard-for-the-pattern risk, not defects introduced by ADM-012's own code, and neither blocks approval. Byte-freeze on POST /api/admin/users/:id/role and PATCH /api/admin/staff/:id/branch was independently re-confirmed by diff. This decision is distinct from and does not restate ADM-011's own review-decision.json (same feature folder, adm-011-add-staff_21-07-26/harness/) -- that decision covers the invite-create/promote/consume surface; this one covers only ADM-012's set-password + web accept-page + acceptUrl-repoint surface. Net gate: PASS. The 5-artifact evidence pack (this file plus risk-gate.json, verification.json, adversarial-validation.json, context-snippets.json) is now complete, satisfying the plan's mustStopBeforeFinalize gate.
